generation_policy.realgm_policy: Small-batch manual/computer-use queue only; no CAPTCHA bypass, no scaled scraping, cache labels as evidence.
notes: V0 uses public/demo NBA cap-sheet seed data only.
RealGM labels remain manual_pending until screenshot and page-text evidence are imported.
Expected labels are heuristic unless label_confidence is realgm or human_reviewed.

scenarios.title: Clean control salary swap with MIL
scenarios.summary: GSW sends one mid-salary player to MIL for a lower-salary rotation player.
scenarios.intended_edge: Control case where salary direction should not create an obvious CBA failure.

scenarios.title: Clean control salary swap with OKC

scenarios.title: Salary-matching stress test with LAL
scenarios.summary: GSW sends a small salary to LAL for a materially larger incoming salary.
scenarios.intended_edge: Incoming salary should exceed a normal matching band for the outgoing package.

scenarios.title: Salary-matching stress test with ORL
scenarios.summary: GSW sends a small salary to ORL for a materially larger incoming salary.
scenarios.intended_edge: Incoming salary should exceed a normal matching band for the outgoing package.

scenarios.summary: GSW sends a small salary to MIL for a materially larger incoming salary.
scenarios.intended_edge: Incoming salary should exceed a normal matching band for the outgoing package.

scenarios.title: Near-band salary match with SAC
scenarios.summary: GSW sends a large veteran salary to SAC for a similar or lower incoming salary.
scenarios.intended_edge: Near-boundary case that should be evaluated by matching math, not vibes.

expected_repair_hints: confirm current team salary and apron status

scenarios.title: Second-apron aggregation check with BOS
scenarios.summary: GSW aggregates multiple outgoing salaries for a higher-salary incoming player from BOS.
scenarios.intended_edge: Tests whether the answer catches aggregation and second-apron runway instead of only comparing total salary.

expected_repair_hints: reduce incoming salary below second-apron runway

scenarios.title: Sign-and-trade hard-cap check with SAC
scenarios.summary: GSW receives a player via sign-and-trade mechanics from SAC.

receives.label: Keegan Murray
receives.notes: Modeled as incoming sign-and-trade player.

receives.label: SAC sign-and-trade rights
receives.notes: Mechanism marker for hard-cap eval; not a salary asset.

sends.label: Keegan Murray
sends.notes: Modeled as incoming sign-and-trade player.

sends.label: SAC sign-and-trade rights
sends.notes: Mechanism marker for hard-cap eval; not a salary asset.

scenarios.intended_edge: Tests whether the answer catches sign-and-trade hard-cap effects for a team already near/over apron lines.

expected_repair_hints: create apron room before receiving sign-and-trade player

scenarios.title: Trade-exception source check with BOS
scenarios.summary: GSW tries to absorb a BOS salary into a hypothetical trade exception.

sends.label: Hypothetical GSW traded-player exception slot
sends.notes: Exception amount must come from a current exception ledger before this can be labeled.

receives.label: Hypothetical GSW traded-player exception slot
receives.notes: Exception amount must come from a current exception ledger before this can be labeled.

scenarios.intended_edge: Forces the answer to ask for the current exception amount rather than assuming the TPE exists and is large enough.

expected_repair_hints: compare player salary to exception room

scenarios.title: Three-team routing check with BOS and UTA
scenarios.summary: GSW sends salary to BOS, BOS routes salary to UTA, and GSW receives salary from UTA.
scenarios.intended_edge: Tests whether the answer keeps team-specific salary flows separate instead of netting the whole trade globally.

scenarios.title: Three-team routing check with CLE and MEM

scenarios.title: Source-needed salary gate with DET
scenarios.summary: GSW evaluates an incoming DET player whose public salary row is missing in the seed.
scenarios.intended_edge: Explicit source-needed case: Gambit should not answer legality confidently without a salary row.

expected_repair_hints: rerun after salary row is captured
